title: Alibaba's AI Engine Is Powering A Still Undervalued Comeback
description: Alibaba (BABA) looks undervalued despite headwinds. Explore cloud & AI growth targets, e-commerce trends, and DCF value of $147–$250/share—read now.

title: AI To Run 50% Of UAE Government Services By 2028 In Global First
description: With this development, UAE will be the first government to operate through autonomous systems at this scale in the world.

title: AI in classrooms risks repeating Norway's iPad mistake, columnist argues
description: Norway gave every child a digital device starting at age 5 in 2016. A decade later, 500,000 Norwegians can't read a text message, and Norway ranks last in children's reading enjoyment among 65 countries.

title: Coinbase’s Jesse Pollak says AI agents are the next big wave for crypto payments
description: The Dawn of AI-Powered Payments: How Cryptocurrency Is Becoming the Currency of Artificial Intelligence A Revolution Nine Months in the Making The digital landscape is experiencing a seismic shift that few saw coming just months ago. According to Jesse Pollak, a key figure at Coinbase and founder of the Base network, we’re witnessing the emergence [...] The post Coinbase’s Jesse Pollak says AI agents are the next big wave for crypto payments appeared first on News Herder .

title: Meta Platforms Will Close 6,000 Open Positions in Addition to Major Layoffs as META Stock Investors Worry That AI Spend Is Just Too Much
description: Meta has tightened hiring and reduced its workforce while accelerating AI investments, prompting investors to weigh rising costs against future returns.
